title: Add CI (fmt, clippy, test)
body:
## Summary
Set up a CI workflow for this Rust workspace that checks formatting, linting, and tests on pull requests.

## Acceptance criteria
- A GitHub Actions workflow runs on pull requests and pushes to `mainline`.
- `cargo fmt --all -- --check` passes in CI.
- `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` passes in CI.
- `cargo test --workspace` passes in CI.
- Workflow output is clear enough to identify which step failed.

title: Make logging initialization idempotent
body:
## Summary
Ensure logging setup can be called multiple times safely without panics or duplicate subscriber registration errors.

## Acceptance criteria
- Calling `logging::setup_logging()` more than once does not panic.
- Repeated initialization does not register duplicate global subscribers.
- Behavior is covered by at least one automated test.
- README or crate docs explain the idempotent behavior briefly.
